title: Recovering a Forgotten Password
drDigitalIntro: Forgetting a password happens to everyone. For websites, use the 'Forgot Password?' link — a reset email will be sent to you. For your computer login password, restart in Recovery Mode (use your system recovery option) and use the Reset Password utility. For other accounts, look for 'Account Recovery' options or contact the company's support. A password manager prevents this problem entirely.

playgroundTask.question: You've forgotten your Google account password. What should you do?

options.text: Create a brand new Google account with a different email
Click 'Forgot Password?' on the Google sign-in page and follow the steps
Call Google's main office and ask them to tell you your password
Accept that the account is lost forever

drDigitalSuccess: Every major service has a 'Forgot Password' or account recovery flow. You'll usually get a reset link by email or a code by text.
drDigitalHint: Look for the option that uses the email or phone number linked to your account to prove who you are.
